column1: # DSFB Oil & Gas — Pipeline Domain Schema Template
# Domain: Subsea/surface pipeline and flowline integrity monitoring.
# Physical channel: flow balance residual (observed − expected) in m³/h.
#   expected_flow_balance    : m³/h — from RTTM or steady-state mass balance
#   observed_flow_balance    : m³/h — from SCADA flow meter historian tag
# Typical sample interval: 30 s historian compression; DSFB works at any rate.
# Minimum recommended: ≥ 2 samples per expected slew transient duration.
